input.command:
gh pr create --title "docs(adr): single-source the ADR index â€” CLAUDE.md Â§9 links docs/adr/README.md" --milestone "v1.1 Week 2 â€” Portability: OTel logs, secrets lifecycle, dry-run depth" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- CLAUDE.md Â§9 duplicated the `docs/adr/README.md` index and the two drifted â€” README still listed ADR 0026 as Proposed/Pending while the ADR file (and Â§9) say **Accepted, phase 1 built 2026-07-04 (#461)**. This PR makes the README index the single source of truth.
- Â§9 becomes a short pointer (the operating rules distilled from the ADRs already live in Â§4â€“Â§6/Â§10â€“Â§11); drops ~9KB of duplicated, drift-prone context from every AI session.
- `docs/adr/README.md` fixed: 0026 moved from Pending into the main index as Accepted; Pending keeps only 0015. The docs-consistency-guard agent's rule 4 now checks index-vs-ADR-file status agreement (and flags any re-grown Â§9 table).

## Linked issue

Refs â€” none (doc-consistency change, suggested by the maintainer)

## Type of change

- [x] docs â€” documentation only

## Checklist

- [x] **Manually tested locally** â€” links resolve; grep confirms the only operational Â§9-table dependents were docs-consistency-guard rules 4/65 (updated); ADR "Related" mentions of Â§9 remain valid (Â§9 still exists, as the pointer)
- [x] **Single functionality** â€” no unrelated changes piggybacked
- [x] **Conventional commit title**
- [x] **No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed**
- [ ] ~Black + Ruff + mypy~ â€” no Python changes
- [ ] ~Prettier + ESLint~ â€” no frontend changes
- [ ] ~Tests added/updated~ â€” markdown only
- [x] **Docs / ADRs updated** â€” this IS the docs change
- [x] **`docs/progress.md` â€” N/A** for this PR
- [x] **Security implications considered** â€” none

## Schema migration?

- [x] No schema change

## Manual test notes

Verified ADR 0026's own `Status:` line says Accepted (phase 1 built 2026-07-04) â€” the README Pending row was the stale copy. Grepped for `Â§9` across the repo: only `.claude/agents/docs-consistency-guard.md` depended on the table operationally (updated here); ADR Related-section mentions still point at a Â§9 that exists.

## Security / risk notes

None â€” markdown only.

đź¤– Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
input.description: Open PR for ADR index single-sourcing

content.text: PR [#648](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/648) is open. Now the Â§12 harness-row refresh on its own branch:

input.old_string: this script opens a test window: `window [--adf] [--dags]` = wake (redisâ†’Airflowâ†’workersâ†’trigger + ADF triggers) â†’ run the flows (mockdata jobs as manual executions; `--dags` REST-triggers the cron DAGs; `--adf` create-runs the Flow-A ADF pipelines â€” the `--adf` pipelines and the `flow_a_snowflake_load` DAG need live Snowflake, the UC/medallion DAGs don't) â†’ sleep again, verified. `status`/`start`/`run`/`stop` also run standalone. Full-cycle validated 2026-07-04 (11.5 min, all flows green). |
input.new_string: this script opens a test window: `window [--adf] [--dags] [--dbt]` = wake (redisâ†’Airflowâ†’workersâ†’trigger + ADF triggers) â†’ run the flows (mockdata jobs as manual executions; `--dags` REST-triggers the cron DAGs; `--adf` create-runs the Flow-A ADF pipelines; `--dbt` resume+starts the `dbt-lineage` ACA job (#609 â€” dbt Core builds the `ANALYTICS_STG` views + `ANALYTICS` mart dynamic tables, artifacts â†’ ADLS `raw/dbt/latest` for the #611 poller) and re-suspends it â€” the `--adf` pipelines, the `flow_a_snowflake_load` DAG **and `--dbt`** need live Snowflake, the UC/medallion DAGs don't) â†’ sleep again, verified. `status`/`start`/`run`/`stop` also run standalone; `status` and `stop` cover the `dbt-lineage` job (its nightly `0 2 * * *` cron is disarmed by `stop` like the mockdata crons). Full-cycle validated 2026-07-04 (11.5 min, all flows green; `--dbt` leg added 2026-07-05). |

input.command:
git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "docs(claude-md): refresh the Â§12 harness-window row for the dbt-lineage leg

The harness gained the #609 dbt Core lineage project today (self-hosted,
ACA Job dbt-lineage on dataq-cae, artifacts to ADLS for the #611 poller)
and harness_window.sh was extended to match: a --dbt run flag
(resumeâ†’startâ†’waitâ†’re-suspend; needs live Snowflake, like --adf), and
status/stop now cover the job so its nightly cron is disarmed while the
harness sleeps. This updates the Â§12 row to describe the new contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push -u origin docs/harness-window-dbt-row && gh pr create --title "docs(claude-md): refresh the Â§12 harness-window row for the dbt-lineage leg" --milestone "v1.1 Week 2 â€” Portability: OTel logs, secrets lifecycle, dry-run depth" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- The harness gained the #609 dbt Core lineage project (ACA Job `dbt-lineage` on `dataq-cae`, cron `0 2 * * *`, artifacts â†’ ADLS `raw/dbt/latest` for the #611 poller) and `harness_window.sh` (harness-side, not git-tracked â€” ADR 0021) was extended to match: `run --dbt` (resumeâ†’startâ†’waitâ†’re-suspend; needs live Snowflake, like `--adf`), and `status`/`stop` now cover the job so its cron is disarmed while the harness sleeps.
- This PR updates the CLAUDE.md Â§12 row describing that script's contract; nothing else.

## Linked issue

Refs #609 / #611 (harness-side dbt leg; the DataQ-side provider is #611)

## Type of change

- [x] docs â€” documentation only

## Checklist

- [x] **Manually tested locally** â€” `bash -n` clean on the updated script; usage header prints the new flags; `dbt-lineage` job confirmed deployed via ARM (Schedule trigger, cron `0 2 * * *`)
- [x] **Single functionality** â€” no unrelated changes piggybacked
- [x] **Conventional commit title**
- [x] **No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed**
- [ ] ~Black + Ruff + mypy~ â€” no Python changes
- [ ] ~Prettier + ESLint~ â€” no frontend changes
- [ ] ~Tests added/updated~ â€” markdown only
- [x] **Docs / ADRs updated** â€” this IS the docs change
- [x] **`docs/progress.md` â€” N/A** for this PR
- [x] **Security implications considered** â€” none (no secrets referenced; the script reads creds from harness terraform outputs as before)

## Schema migration?

- [x] No schema change

## Manual test notes

Script changes live harness-side (`~/Coding/Python/DataQ-harness/scripts/harness_window.sh`, not git-tracked): `bash -n` passes, usage header shows `run [--adf] [--dags] [--dbt]`, `ALL_JOBS` (mockdata Ă—5 + `dbt-lineage`) drives `status` + `stop`, and the `--dbt` leg mirrors the existing resume/start/wait/suspend idiom. The full `window --dbt` cycle hasn't been run yet (burns a wake window) â€” noted as not-yet-window-validated in the row.

## Security / risk notes

None â€” markdown only.

EOF
)"
